Submission and inclusion in the directory does not change the functionality of your connector. It simply allows it to be listed.

78SRtbTqHI.en: Help me build a 30-day onboarding checklist for a new hire on my team.

79nxFSPrBl.zh: 要求团队成员先验证设备，才能远程控制本地 Claude Code 会话。成员首次从新设备连接时会被提示进行注册。<link>了解更多</link>
79nxFSPrBl.en: Require team members to verify their device before controlling local Claude Code sessions remotely. Members will be prompted to enroll the first time they connect from a new device. <link>Learn more</link>

7CyTe1G1ef.zh: 您的团队开始新 Claude Code web 会话时预选的环境或运行器池。
7CyTe1G1ef.en: The environment or runner pool pre-selected when your team starts a new Claude Code web session.

7DQcnv1IRS.zh: 在 Cowork 中以双倍用量做更多事，即日起至 7 月 5 日
7DQcnv1IRS.en: Do more with double the usage in Cowork, now until July 5

7EbH8hxlzW.zh: 本周的反馈主题，已起草并于周一早晨备好
7EbH8hxlzW.en: This week's feedback themes, drafted and ready Monday morning

7EpRnG/Kol.zh: 移除 {overage, plural, one {# 个地址} other {# 个地址}} 以继续。需要更多容量？<link>联系销售</link>
7EpRnG/Kol.en: Remove {overage, plural, one {# address} other {# addresses}} to continue. Need more capacity? <link>Contact sales</link>

7FGXQIVLgp.zh: 它将不会再次显示。代理在每次心跳时都用它进行身份验证——如果您丢失了它，请撤销此注册并创建一个新的。
7FGXQIVLgp.en: It won't be shown again. The proxy authenticates with it on every heartbeat — if you lose it, revoke this registration and create a new one.

7FyEwY5cXb.zh: 管理用户邀请、席位分配和取消配置。
7FyEwY5cXb.en: Manage user invitations, seat assignments, and deprovisioning.

7G8vRXjEWS.zh: 已在基础分支上——请先检出一个功能分支
7G8vRXjEWS.en: Already on the base branch — check out a feature branch first

7GCvHA5do9.zh: 给我一个规划模块重构的分步框架：如何安全地排序变更，以及在每个阶段需要测试什么。
7GCvHA5do9.en: Give me a step-by-step framework for planning a module refactor: how to sequence changes safely and what to test at each stage.

7H52V8cfN1.zh: 运行功能测试——调用 {count} 个只读工具
7H52V8cfN1.en: Run functional tests — calls {count} read-only tool(s)

7I76Gt7pqd.zh: 整理一份可直接面向客户的 QBR 演示文稿——拉取该客户的近期新闻，将其融入幻灯片，最后给出一项建议。从我已连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个来源，请在制作前询问。
7I76Gt7pqd.en: Put together a customer-ready QBR deck — pull recent news on the account, work it into the slides, end with a recommendation. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

7IQgds8u1T.zh: 为我讲解最有用的咨询框架——MECE、议题树、假设驱动型问题求解——以及何时该使用哪一种。
7IQgds8u1T.en: Walk me through the most useful consulting frameworks — MECE, issue trees, hypothesis-driven problem solving — and when to reach for each.

7JOC2r88CJ.zh: 议题已打开、编辑、删除等。

7JP298iIRC.zh: 导出您的对话、项目和文件的副本
7JP298iIRC.en: Export a copy of your conversations, projects, and files

7JzwmYwdqB.zh: 向 Claude 询问您的代码

7KFLgD8w8i.zh: 无法从您的身份提供商获取登录令牌。请尝试退出登录后重新登录，然后再次连接。
7KFLgD8w8i.en: Couldn't get a sign-in token from your identity provider. Try signing out and back in, then reconnect.

7NIBxwugIx.zh: 已与远程会话断开连接。发送消息或刷新以重新连接。
7NIBxwugIx.en: Disconnected from the remote session. Send a message or refresh to reconnect.

7PQu3bgx83.zh: 用量额度会随使用逐步扣减。适合偶尔的忙碌日子。
7PQu3bgx83.en: Usage credits draw down as you go. Good for occasional busy days.

7PpIRe7tuL.zh: 立即预留一个名称；您应用的 URL 将在下次部署时切换。
7PpIRe7tuL.en: Reserve a name now; your app's URL switches on the next deploy.

7Rs6WZbci3.zh: 您创建的项目将显示在此处。
7Rs6WZbci3.en: Projects you create will show up here.

7TICmxuTsz.zh: 您的账户已禁用额外用量。请管理消费限额以立即继续。
7TICmxuTsz.en: Extra usage is disabled for your account. Manage spend limit to keep going now.

7UETpE/OHp.zh: 我会在下方粘贴我的数据集（或描述其列）——然后帮我弄清楚先看什么，以及从哪些图表入手。
7UETpE/OHp.en: I'll paste my dataset (or describe its columns) below — then help me figure out what to look at first and which plots to start with.

7UUZNR6Ap5.zh: 您的组织已用完用量额度。请购买更多以立即继续，或等到 {day} {time} 您的套餐用量重置。
7UUZNR6Ap5.en: Your org is out of usage credits. Buy more to keep going now, or wait until {day} at {time} when your plan usage resets.

7WkvzNBqWd.zh: 最高强度可能会消耗过多 token，导致触及限额。建议使用较低的强度设置。
7WkvzNBqWd.en: Max effort can use excessive tokens resulting in hitting limits. Consider using a lower effort setting.

7XLBSpnkO+.zh: 点击上方的 验证我的年龄——验证约需一分钟，若通过，您的账户将自动恢复。
7XLBSpnkO+.en: Tap Verify my age above — verification takes about a minute and your account is restored automatically if you pass.

7YpOS0414K.zh: 用于此 Conway 中的新对话轮次。更改它不会影响您的其他聊天。
7YpOS0414K.en: Used for new turns in this Conway. Changing it doesn't affect your other chats.

7ZWE+v/Zjn.zh: 创建一个我可以为供应商填写的 RFP 模板。包含范围、需求、评估标准和时间安排等部分。
7ZWE+v/Zjn.en: Create an RFP template I can fill in for a vendor. Include sections for scope, requirements, evaluation criteria, and timeline.

7ZlhrDLJqV.zh: 您配置中的某些设置已弃用或可能引发问题。请查看详情，然后打开设置进行更新。
7ZlhrDLJqV.en: Some settings in your configuration are deprecated or could cause issues. See Details, then open Setup to update them.

7beLuu03iF.zh: 将于 {date} 成为必需项并启用。
7beLuu03iF.en: Will be required and enabled on {date}.

7eGQWNqjXT.zh: 为每个代理的 GitHub 请求从此 App 的私钥生成安装令牌。私钥为只写，保存后不再显示。
7eGQWNqjXT.en: Mints an installation token from this App's private key for each proxied GitHub request. The private key is write-only and never shown after saving.

7eMdIUQj/m.zh: 您的组织目前均不符合条件。请查看每个组织旁的原因，或在下方创建新的 Team 组织。
7eMdIUQj/m.en: None of your organizations are currently eligible. See the reason next to each, or create a new Team organization below.

7iFJ6SiLGm.zh: 您保存的付款方式被拒绝。请尝试其他卡。
7iFJ6SiLGm.en: Your saved payment method was declined. Try a different card.

7knnVyGATZ.zh: 您的 GitHub 组织设有 IP 允许列表，正在阻止 Claude 的服务器。请将 <link>Claude 的 IP 范围</link> 添加到您的 GitHub 允许列表，然后重试。
7knnVyGATZ.en: Your GitHub organization has an IP allowlist that is blocking Claude's servers. Add <link>Claude's IP ranges</link> to your GitHub allowlist, then try again.

7o2/DKHv/F.zh: 帮我调试一段堆栈跟踪——我会在下方粘贴。逐步分析并指出可能的根本原因。
7o2/DKHv/F.en: Help me debug a stack trace — I'll paste it below. Walk through it and point to the likely root cause.

7pQN5F/n/2.zh: 这些控件将于 2026 年 6 月 5 日迁移至 <link>托管设置</link>。
7pQN5F/n/2.en: These controls are moving to <link>Managed settings</link> on June 5, 2026.

7qMu4OdZsc.zh: 您的组织本月已达到消费限额。请管理消费限额以立即继续，或等到 {time} 您的套餐用量重置。
7qMu4OdZsc.en: Your org has reached its spend limit for this month. Manage spend limit to keep going now, or wait until {time} when your plan usage resets.

7sDcr49UF4.zh: 若您曾有有效的付费订阅，在您的账户被暂停时已取消，且上一笔付款已退款。
7sDcr49UF4.en: If you had an active paid subscription, it was cancelled when your account was put on hold and your last payment was refunded.

7sXvnsxywE.zh: Claude Code Desktop 已强制执行您的 托管设置 和 MDM 部署的配置。此旧版开关将在后续版本中弃用。若要保持现有限制生效，请在托管设置中或通过 MDM 将 permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode 设为 {value}。
7sXvnsxywE.en: Claude Code Desktop already enforces your Managed settings and MDM-deployed configuration. This legacy toggle will be retired in an upcoming release. To keep an existing restriction in effect, set permissions.disableBypassPermissionsMode to {value} in Managed settings or via MDM.

7sqrf3CZ6B.zh: 具有 Cognitive Services 范围的 Entra ID 应用注册的目录（租户）ID。
7sqrf3CZ6B.en: Directory (tenant) ID of the Entra ID app registration that has the Cognitive Services scope.

7syhs9KZet.zh: 服务器 URL 无效。您可以检查 URL 后重试。
7syhs9KZet.en: The server URL isn't valid. You can check the URL and try again.

7syyPo6BcF.zh: 创建和修改您的 Claude Design 项目
7syyPo6BcF.en: Create and modify your Claude Design projects

7uVqyrFzVP.zh: 尝试次数过多。请等待几分钟后再试。
7uVqyrFzVP.en: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes before trying again.

7uwUC59rlx.zh: 从对话创建：“为我们的发布生成一份 5 页、风格大胆的宣讲稿。”
7uwUC59rlx.en: Create from a conversation: “Generate a pitch deck for our launch with 5 slides and a bold tone.”

7vjQfbxQ8k.zh: 类别用于在 UI 中筛选连接器。最多可选择 {max} 个。
7vjQfbxQ8k.en: Categories are used to filter connectors in the UI. Select up to {max}.

7yCDEvvonp.zh: 搭建一个周一早晨的指挥中心——一个平铺式仪表板，包含我的待办事项、尚未回复的邮件，以及需要准备的会议等卡片。先用一个示例周展示它的样子。我们之后可以连接 Slack、Gmail 和我的日历，让它每周一运行。
7yCDEvvonp.en: Set up a Monday morning command center — a tiled dashboard with cards for my action items, emails I haven't replied to, and meetings that need prep. Show me what it looks like with a sample week first. We can connect Slack, Gmail, and my calendar later to run it every Monday.

7yXozdQoAD.zh: 无法关闭请求。您可以重试。
7yXozdQoAD.en: Couldn't dismiss request. You can try again.

7zbjpRKZAv.zh: 您已有一份证书正在审核中。
7zbjpRKZAv.en: You already have a certificate under review.

8/8Rm20Y/g.zh: 您最近已同步。请稍候片刻后重试。
8/8Rm20Y/g.en: You synced recently. Please wait a moment and try again.

80SZmOzpMP.zh: 此指南不存在或已被移除。
80SZmOzpMP.en: This guide doesn't exist or was removed.

82zsRtcsgV.zh: 自动模式让 Claude 自动处理权限提示。Claude 会在执行前检查每次工具调用是否存在风险操作和提示注入，运行它评估为风险较低的调用，并阻止其余的。
82zsRtcsgV.en: Auto mode lets Claude handle permission prompts automatically. Claude checks each tool call for risky actions and prompt injection before executing, runs the ones it assesses as lower-risk, and blocks the rest.

852HznY0AW.zh: 用量额度会在每个账单周期结束时显示在您的账单上。
852HznY0AW.en: Usage credits show up on your invoice at the end of each billing cycle.

85VTkK2wHr.zh: 进行这些更改后，{count, plural, one {# 名用户} other {# 名用户}} 将不再分配任何自定义角色。他们将无法再访问由自定义角色启用的任何功能。
85VTkK2wHr.en: After these changes, {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}} will have no custom roles assigned. They will no longer have access to any features enabled by custom roles.

86Ml9zdSs9.zh: 这些不会阻止提交——它们将与您的回答一起分享给审核团队。
86Ml9zdSs9.en: These don't block submitting — they'll be shared with the review team alongside your answers.

88MPmi3Kex.zh: 磁盘空间不足，无法设置工作区。请释放空间后重试。
88MPmi3Kex.en: Not enough disk space to set up the workspace. Free up space and try again.

8A1Nf0mHyK.en: Required when a client secret is configured. For mcp.box.com use ["https://api.box.com"].

8By5nlWG7I.zh: 动态工作流让 Claude 在单个任务上展开调用多个子代理
8By5nlWG7I.en: Dynamic workflows let Claude fan out to many subagents on a single task

8C+hlpjXXu.zh: 重命名池失败。您可以重试。
8C+hlpjXXu.en: Failed to rename pool. You can try again.

8CGvSG1VJL.zh: ↑ ↓ 导航{sep}Enter 选择{sep}⌘ Enter 提交
8CGvSG1VJL.en: ↑ ↓ to navigate{sep}Enter to select{sep}⌘ Enter to submit

8F+30bQ20n.en: Optional auth headers for the collector.

8MEdGSggd1.en: The Claude GitHub App isn't installed on this repository. Install it to run a scan.

8N9621GkBg.zh: 尚未创建任何 API 密钥。
8N9621GkBg.en: No API keys have been created yet.

8PL8/DQ38G.zh: Claude 建议的后续任务会以通知形式出现在右上角——点击即可派生一个任务或在此处理
8PL8/DQ38G.en: Claude's suggested follow-up tasks appear as a notification in the top right — click to spin one off or handle it here

8TyU5yY7ic.zh: 消费限额仍在加载中。请稍后重试。
8TyU5yY7ic.en: Spend limits are still loading. Try again in a moment.

8XiNMbMZFX.zh: 自动化任务：“为此话题中的每个行动项创建一个任务。”
8XiNMbMZFX.en: Automate a task: “Create a task for each action item in this thread.”

8a8+TeDqJr.zh: 此运行器签发的任何会话令牌也将被吊销。
8a8+TeDqJr.en: Any session tokens this runner issued will also be revoked.

8dJ8zyhkVV.zh: Entra ID 应用注册的应用程序（客户端）ID。该应用必须允许公共客户端流程以支持设备代码。
8dJ8zyhkVV.en: Application (client) ID of the Entra ID app registration. The app must allow public client flows for device code.

8dcRa4i+v2.zh: {count, plural, one {隐藏了 # 个已完成的例程} other {隐藏了 # 个已完成的例程}}
8dcRa4i+v2.en: {count, plural, one {# completed routine hidden} other {# completed routines hidden}}

8fXrWqpNtx.zh: {count, plural, one {# 个用量额度申请} other {# 个用量额度申请}}
8fXrWqpNtx.en: {count, plural, one {# usage credit request} other {# usage credit requests}}

8hjKalqco/.zh: 您的反馈、诊断日志和任务记录将用于改进 Cowork。
8hjKalqco/.en: Your feedback, diagnostic logs, and task transcript will be used to improve Cowork.

8iFOB5Ru96.zh: 已处理 {amount} 的退款（另加 {creditsAmount} 的未使用用量额度）。预计在 3–10 个工作日内到账。
8iFOB5Ru96.en: Refund of {amount} (plus {creditsAmount} for unused usage credits) processed. Expect it in 3–10 business days.

8iNAKdp37n.zh: 更新 Claude Desktop 以为此模型启用快速模式
8iNAKdp37n.en: Update Claude Desktop to enable fast mode for this model

8igZF1i+Pg.zh: 该设备已显示在另一个磁贴中。
8igZF1i+Pg.en: That device is already shown in another tile.

8jEVRl+dbg.zh: 已暂停——将在下一条消息时恢复

8k6fMsg4IY.zh: 您的席位类型不包含额外用量。立即管理支出限额以继续使用。
8k6fMsg4IY.en: Your seat type doesn't include extra usage. Manage spend limit to keep going now.

8kxdCDZYEr.zh: 帮助改进我们的 AI 模型：

8mCtZZmdKM.zh: 调用其无法控制的第三方 API 的连接器通常不会被收录到目录中。请在合规步骤的“附加说明”中解释您的情况。
8mCtZZmdKM.en: Connectors that call third-party APIs they don't control are typically not accepted to the directory. Explain your situation in Additional notes on the Compliance step.

8mRSoJLpG6.zh: 请告诉我们用户如何向您的服务器进行身份验证，以便我们正确列出并引导合适的连接流程。
8mRSoJLpG6.en: Tell us how users authenticate with your server so we can list it correctly and route the right connection flow.

8pB3pA45eO.zh: 要使用{feature, select, voice {语音} other {听写}}，请选择浏览器地址栏中的网站设置图标并允许使用麦克风。
8pB3pA45eO.en: To use {feature, select, voice {voice} other {dictation}}, select the site settings icon in your browser's address bar and allow the microphone.

8rn8rv6K0z.zh: 从这次对话开始，跨对话记住信息。
8rn8rv6K0z.en: Remember information across conversations, starting from this one.

8sEg8zVUkv.zh: 每个邮箱后按回车键，或粘贴一个列表。
8sEg8zVUkv.en: Press enter after each email, or paste a list.

8vlKwS/pfy.zh: 分屏视图现已采用自适应网格平铺——在宽屏上容纳更多会话
8vlKwS/pfy.en: Split view now tiles into an adaptive grid — fit more sessions on a wide screen

8y0ekybqHa.zh: 加载技能失败。请尝试刷新页面。
8y0ekybqHa.en: Failed to load skills. Try refreshing the page.

8zBBdLtuin.zh: 结果会随您的输入实时更新。按向下箭头键转到结果，按 Escape 键返回此处。
8zBBdLtuin.en: Results update as you type. Press Down Arrow to go to results, Escape to return here.

9+GO1v/jPW.zh: 购买用量额度，以便您的团队在达到限额时仍能继续使用 Claude。
9+GO1v/jPW.en: Buy usage credits so your team can keep using Claude if they hit a limit.

9+xImU/m9u.zh: 在设置中启用 Claude Security 以开始扫描您的代码库。
9+xImU/m9u.en: Enable Claude Security in settings to start scanning your repositories.

933XjkoVGh.zh: 未找到模拟器——请在 Xcode 中安装一个
933XjkoVGh.en: No simulators found — install one in Xcode

9APUjQes22.zh: 您的席位类型不包含用量额度。
9APUjQes22.en: Your seat type doesn't include usage credits.

9AucHUJjjh.zh: 可在 Claude.ai、Claude Code、Claude Desktop 或第三方应用中使用此额度。用完后，您可以添加更多用量额度，以便在超出套餐限额后继续使用。有效期至 {date}。
9AucHUJjjh.en: Use the credit on Claude.ai, Claude Code, Claude Desktop, or third-party apps. When it runs out, you can add more usage credits to keep going past your plan limits. Expires {date}.

9B9oxKzS23.zh: 我们一起来解决点什么吧

9CYg800SaU.zh: 新会话默认使用您项目 `settings.json` 中的模型
9CYg800SaU.en: Your project's `settings.json` model is used by default for new sessions

9D1lLcQFKf.zh: 管理员角色的分析功能正在从 Claude.ai 扩展到 Claude Code 和 Cowork。它将于 {date} 自动为所有管理员启用，或者您现在可以在自定义角色中将其开启。
9D1lLcQFKf.en: Analytics for the Admin role is expanding beyond Claude.ai to cover Claude Code and Cowork. It turns on automatically for all admins on {date}, or you can turn it on now in custom roles.

9DlWH0xonp.zh: 您组织中的 Claude Code 现已禁用零数据保留。更改可能需要几分钟才能生效。
9DlWH0xonp.en: Zero Data Retention is now disabled for Claude Code in your organization. Changes may take a few minutes to take effect.

9Ic3U/9KsP.zh: 自动允许已被您的管理员禁用

9IqzYQZfCD.zh: 当 Claude 了解您所看重的内容时，它会给出更好的答案
9IqzYQZfCD.en: Claude gives better answers when it understands what matters to you

9Jku0P9CRJ.zh: 您的所有项目都已有排期。
9Jku0P9CRJ.en: All of your projects already have a schedule.

9JwFrHkhbZ.zh: 自定义的每日和每周上限将被移除。在群组设置了每日或每周限额的地方，该限额仍将适用。
9JwFrHkhbZ.en: Custom daily and weekly caps will be removed. Where a group sets a daily or weekly limit, that limit will still apply.

9ORjMEju5A.zh: 使用此密钥进行身份验证的任何内容都将失去访问权限。此操作无法撤销。
9ORjMEju5A.en: Anything authenticating with this key will lose access. This action cannot be undone.

A30swJoJat.en: Calls are made with your connected account. Tool annotations are self-reported by the server and not verified by Anthropic — connect a test account with representative data where possible. Write/destructive tools are never called. Snippets of the tool responses are saved with your submission for Anthropic reviewers, so don't run this against a server holding real customer data.

ATiEEnZh2l.en: To enforce member permissions with custom roles, go to the Members page and change the member's role type to Custom roles. Custom roles cannot grant features disabled at the organization level. Learn more about roles and permissions, or see the setup guide when configuring custom roles.

CCKrK/XryZ.en: Auto-populate the model picker from {url} at launch; when this key isn't set in the config, discovery is skipped if the model list below makes it unnecessary.

CR09OGPdpk.en: Seats can be set up for usage credits once rate limits are hit. Usage credits are billed at API rates on an additional invoice. Admins can enable this and set spend limits in Settings. <link>Token pricing can be found here.</link>

CUo9b6y3JH.en: Enabling HIPAA compliance executes Anthropic's Business Associate Agreement (BAA) and configures this Claude Enterprise organization to handle Protected Health Information (PHI) within the Eligible Services the BAA covers.

ChatCodeExecEnabledHint.en: Allow Claude to run code in a local sandbox in Chat conversations. The sandbox can read only the files attached to the conversation and has no network access. Off by default; without it Claude can't analyze spreadsheets or other files that require computation in Chat.

D+i4rWGZl+.en: We put your account on hold because of unusual activity. We can't share the specifics—that would help bad actors get around the same checks—but the review is your chance to share context so a team member can review. This affects only your account, not your workspace or teammates.

Set this to run automatically each weekday around 8am so it's waiting for me when I start. If you don't have access to my calendar, inbox, or CRM yet, pull up the right connectors for me so I can add them right here.

IPiWs8m7Em.en: Build me a 3-year financial model — base, bull, and bear cases, linked formulas, sensitivity table. Use this template, and pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

IarVDo1D+f.zh: 制作符合品牌风格的演示文稿

Iba8/izEmK.zh: 每周梳理一遍我们收集的用户和客户反馈，起草一份主要主题的摘要——人们在要求什么、什么让他们感到沮丧，以及有哪些比以往出现得更频繁——附上示例引文及其来源。设置为每周一早上自动运行，这样我开始新的一周时它就准备好了。如果您还看不到我们的反馈来源——支持工单、调查、通话记录或反馈工具——请为我列出合适的连接器，以便我能在这里直接连接它们。
Iba8/izEmK.en: Each week, go through the user and customer feedback we've collected and draft a digest of the main themes — what people are asking for, what's frustrating them, and anything coming up more than it used to — with example quotes and where they came from. Set it to run automatically every Monday morning so it's ready when I start the week. If you can't see our feedback sources yet — support tickets, surveys, call notes, or a feedback tool — surface the right connectors for me so I can connect them right here.

JkumrVLqpc.en: Help me respond to a sales objection without sounding defensive — I'll share what the prospect said.

JxRHpCue4t.en: One certificate is already under review. You can upload another once review is complete.

K+HLu2negq.en: Failed to associate. You can try again.

K0BeG04X9q.zh: 我将在下方粘贴一篇论文。请从以下方面进行总结：贡献、方法、关键结果，以及它未能展示或无法声称的内容。
K0BeG04X9q.en: I'll paste a paper below. Summarize it covering: contribution, method, key results, and what it doesn't show or can't claim.

K27ol/KhQQ.zh: 帮我做一份差异分析——实际值对比预算，解释最大的差异，并标记出任何无法对账的地方。请使用此模板，并从我连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个数据源，请在开始前询问我。
K27ol/KhQQ.en: Run me a variance analysis — actuals vs budget, the biggest deltas explained, and flag anything that doesn't reconcile. Use this template, and pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

K5YEiW3NOB.zh: 请查看我们的<tos>服务条款</tos>和<aup>使用政策</aup>，了解 Claude 的可用范围。
K5YEiW3NOB.en: See our <tos>Terms of Service</tos> and <aup>Usage Policy</aup> for what Claude can be used for.

K5n/qqgZlZ.zh: 在我开完会后，向我的团队频道发布一份总结——决策、带负责人的行动项、未决问题——如果某负责人的事项仍未解决，请在下次会议前 2 天提醒他们。请从我连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个数据源，请在开始前询问我。
K5n/qqgZlZ.en: After my meetings, post a summary to my team channel — decisions, action items with owners, open questions — and remind owners 2 days before the next meeting if their item is still open. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

KCtvHOZ0pQ.en: No charge until you confirm on the next step.

NA8UkX3gci.zh: 在月末前几天，整理一份月结准备包：实际值与预算及上月的对比、值得关注的差异，以及一段简短说明，阐述每项差异的成因，以便我提前着手月结。设置为每月在月末前自动运行。如果您还无法访问我们的会计和费用系统，请为我推荐合适的连接器，以便我可以直接在此连接它们。
NA8UkX3gci.en: A few days before month-end, put together a close prep pack: actuals versus budget and versus last month, the variances that matter, and a short note on what's driving each one so I can get a head start on the close. Set it to run automatically each month ahead of month-end. If you can't see our accounting and expense systems yet, surface the right connectors for me so I can connect them right here.

NAen74+5KK.zh: 创建并命名您自己的会话分组——将会话拖入其中，或右键单击会话 →“移至分组”
NAen74+5KK.en: Create and name your own session groups — drag sessions in, or right-click a session → `Move to group`

NN659NMCyF.en: User email to impersonate via Google Workspace domain-wide delegation (requires delegation already granted for the service account's client ID on these scopes). Leave blank for the service account to act as itself.

NNOx5xaLRj.en: Set via ?gb_gate_* / ?gb_feature_* query parameters. These persist in this browser until removed, and win over the overrides above. Add ?gb_clear=1 to any URL to drop them all.

NODc2176Zs.en: Your MCP server's favicon is used as your icon in the directory listing and in product, via standard favicon linking. Optionally, set a custom icon URL below; it's respected in the directory listing. We recommend leaving this unset so the favicon from your MCP URL is shown.

O3+tRxyH3n.zh: 用于网关登录的外部 IdP。用户对该颁发者进行身份验证；生成的令牌（默认为 ID 令牌）将作为 Bearer 凭据发送至网关。仅当网关本身就是 OAuth 授权服务器时才将此项留空。
O3+tRxyH3n.en: External IdP for gateway sign-in. The user authenticates against this issuer; the resulting token (ID token by default) is sent to the gateway as the Bearer credential. Leave unset only if the gateway is its own OAuth authorization server.

cCi8DNBIJd.zh: 用户在 OAuth 流程成功之前必须拥有或完成的任何条件——付费套餐层级、管理员角色、已启用 API 访问、加入允许列表等。会显示在目录页面上，以免用户在连接过程中遇到死胡同。
cCi8DNBIJd.en: Anything a user must have or do before the OAuth flow will succeed — paid plan tier, admin role, API access enabled, allowlisting, etc. Shown to users on the directory page so they don't hit a dead end mid-connect.

cEODxG0K2h.zh: 您的订阅以 {currency} 计费。将您的账单国家/地区更改为 {country} 会将您的续订货币切换为 {fallback}。
cEODxG0K2h.en: Your subscription is billed in {currency}. Changing your billing country to {country} will switch your renewal currency to {fallback}.

cF2v7DP0GL.zh: 请先开始对话，然后再次尝试 /feedback。
cF2v7DP0GL.en: Start a conversation first, then try /feedback again.

cIhy/1CdU5.zh: 无法加载连接器目录。某些连接器详情可能缺失。
cIhy/1CdU5.en: Couldn't load the connectors directory. Some connector details may be missing.

cJF3YC4JVz.zh: 此文件位于远程容器中，无法下载。
cJF3YC4JVz.en: This file lives in the remote container and isn't downloadable.

cMzMxkGoQ0.zh: Claude Security 的每月支出上限
cMzMxkGoQ0.en: Monthly spend limit for Claude Security

cNKkQb0v3X.zh: 该 BAA 还涵盖您对 Anthropic API 和带 ZDR 的 Claude Code 的使用（适用于符合条件的组织）。这些服务需单独配置。请联系您的客户团队，以使用其他符合条件的服务启用 HIPAA。
cNKkQb0v3X.en: The BAA also covers your use of the Anthropic API and Claude Code with ZDR (for qualifying organizations). Those services are configured separately. Contact your account team to enable HIPAA with other Eligible Services.

cNjUc3GutQ.zh: 与上方结构化匹配进行 AND 运算的布尔 CEL 表达式。用于匹配字段无法表达的谓词。
cNjUc3GutQ.en: A boolean CEL expression ANDed with the structured match above. Use for predicates the match fields can't express.

cQvKA9QV6H.zh: 我会粘贴一个商业案例——然后帮我梳理核心问题树、关键假设，以及能证实或推翻每个假设的数据。
cQvKA9QV6H.en: I'll paste a business case — then help me map the core issue tree, key hypotheses, and the data that would prove or kill each one.

cTkys38y/9.zh: 构建长篇内容的最佳方式是什么——随笔、文章还是论辩？请带我了解如何搭建一个结构严谨的提纲。
cTkys38y/9.en: What's the best way to structure a long piece — essay, article, or argument? Walk me through how to build an outline that holds together.

cUajZeWUSc.zh: 文件上传失败。您可以在对话中重新附加。
cUajZeWUSc.en: File upload failed. You can re-attach in the chat.

cUkaKX+0JA.zh: 与连接器的连接已断开。您可以重试。
cUkaKX+0JA.en: Connection to the connector was lost. You can try again.

cUnRExpJpM.zh: 用户需要先连接，然后才能使用任何工具或资源。
cUnRExpJpM.en: Users need to connect before any tools or resources are available.

cVZHXzfYOF.zh: 尚未配置 GitHub Enterprise 实例。请添加一个以开始使用。
cVZHXzfYOF.en: No GitHub Enterprise instances configured. Add one to get started.

cWH/+f1VV8.zh: 无法加载您的组织。请重试。
cWH/+f1VV8.en: We couldn’t load your organizations. Please try again.

cWHePzM1Cd.zh: 现在使用积分 • 您的套餐限额将于 {day} {time} 重置。
cWHePzM1Cd.en: Now using credits • Your plan limit resets {day} at {time}.

cWJfIHFj/W.en: {email} has met their usage credit limit.

cXF2M88X5I.zh: 使用此成员所属群组和席位等级中的最高限额。可在用量设置中更改优先级。
cXF2M88X5I.en: Using the highest limit from this member's groups and seat tier. Change the precedence in usage settings.

cbAerr6wEQ.zh: 成员登录时会根据 IdP 群组成员身份分配到一个角色。如果其 IdP 群组映射到多个角色，则以下表中的第一个角色生效。不在已映射群组中的成员将被移出组织。
cbAerr6wEQ.en: Members are assigned to one role based on IdP group membership when they sign in. If their IdP groups map to multiple roles, the first role in the table below applies. Members not in a mapped group are removed from the organization.

cc4tPynCta.zh: 工作团队池提供方受众。设置后，登录将使用您自己的 IdP 加上 GCP STS 交换，而非 Google 身份。
cc4tPynCta.en: Workforce-pool provider audience. When set, sign-in uses your own IdP plus a GCP STS exchange instead of a Google identity.

cflWd3GEL5.zh: Claude Code 无法将其设置文件写入临时目录。请检查临时目录是否可写，或调整沙箱策略。
cflWd3GEL5.en: Claude Code couldn't write its settings file to the temporary directory. Check that the temp directory is writable, or adjust the sandbox policy.

cmzXoKdwPd.zh: 您可以先让 Claude 总结此对话，然后粘贴到新对话中。
cmzXoKdwPd.en: You can ask Claude to summarize this conversation first, then paste into a new one.

cn0BZUbkzw.zh: 降级后您的对话仍会保留
cn0BZUbkzw.en: Your chats stay if you downgrade

cnHH1HEs1x.zh: 选择 Chat 和 Cowork 中新对话的起始模型。成员可随时使用模型选择器更改其模型，Claude 会记住他们上次的选择以便下次使用。
cnHH1HEs1x.en: Choose the starting model for new conversations in Chat and Cowork. Members can change their model anytime using the model picker, and Claude remembers their last selection for next time.

cqtDKyc29T.zh: 正在等待您在浏览器中授权…
cqtDKyc29T.en: Waiting for authorization in your browser…

ctWkktQM0M.zh: 在不影响主对话的情况下从旁提问。Claude 能看到完整上下文，且此处的内容都不会被添加进去。
ctWkktQM0M.en: Ask on the side without touching the main chat. Claude sees the full context, and nothing here is added to it.

cv0UOD58gK.zh: 此会话已存在 {hours, plural, one {# 小时} other {# 小时}}。
cv0UOD58gK.en: This session is {hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} old.

d1Kk+iATfF.zh: 要将“{name}”从您的组织中移除吗？成员将不再看到来自此来源的插件。您稍后可以重新添加。
d1Kk+iATfF.en: Remove "{name}" from your organization? Members will no longer see plugins from this source. You can add it back later.

d4u+iLejts.zh: 用量翻倍，截至 7 月 5 日

d9tNprxsrU.zh: 开始 Claude Code 免费试用

dAAs2ZCYuk.zh: 您选择了“仅读取”，但以下工具被标注为会写入数据（readOnlyHint=false 或 destructiveHint=true）：{tools}。请选择“读取和写入”，或修正您服务器上的工具标注。
dAAs2ZCYuk.en: You selected Read only, but these tools are annotated as writing data (readOnlyHint=false or destructiveHint=true): {tools}. Choose Read and write, or fix the tool annotations on your server.

dASzGfiDEA.zh: 允许 Claude 自动将会话分类为已阻止、待审查或已完成。会话分类会计入您的套餐用量。适用于新会话。
dASzGfiDEA.en: Allow Claude to automatically classify sessions as blocked, ready for review, or done. Classifying sessions counts towards your plan usage. Applies to new sessions.

dBdqoa/Bno.zh: 未找到插件（{skipped} 个非插件{skipped, plural, one {条目} other {条目}}）
dBdqoa/Bno.en: No plugins found ({skipped} non-plugin {skipped, plural, one {entry} other {entries}})

dEdA60m9FJ.zh: 作为 Authorization: Basic 标头随每个发往允许主机的代理请求发送。值为只写，保存后将不再显示。
dEdA60m9FJ.en: Sent as an Authorization: Basic header on every proxied request to allowed hosts. Values are write-only and never shown after saving.

dGXWNrEbte.zh: 每天早上对新问题进行分类并标记重复项
dGXWNrEbte.en: Triage new issues and flag duplicates each morning

dH8dliMp56.zh: 先创建一个注册项，然后在您的网络中用密钥部署 agent-proxy 二进制文件。关联环境或运行器池，将它们的会话通过它路由。
dH8dliMp56.en: Create a registration, then deploy the agent-proxy binary in your network with the secret. Associate environments or runner pools to route their sessions through it.

dJLcQZRSQW.zh: 选择一个模板或提出问题。Claude 可以查询您组织的用量、支出和采用指标。
dJLcQZRSQW.en: Pick a template or ask a question. Claude can query your organization's usage, spend, and adoption metrics.

dMZGKNLF+t.zh: 这些会显示在您的目录列表中，并帮助我们审查工具集是否与所述用途相符。
dMZGKNLF+t.en: These appear on your directory listing and inform our review of whether the tool set matches the stated purpose.

dN1nhuij65.zh: 即使您的本地分支名称与远程不匹配，PR 栏也能找到您打开的 PR
dN1nhuij65.en: The PR bar finds your open PR even when your local branch name doesn't match the remote's

dP9gSat5gA.en: Wait a moment, then try again.

dPjlbCZyRa.zh: 更高的用量限额，推荐用于 Claude Code 和 Cowork，高流量时段优先访问，以及更多。
dPjlbCZyRa.en: Higher usage limits, recommended for Claude Code and Cowork, priority access at high traffic times, and more.

dRE4SG0mip.zh: 此连接器不使用身份验证。您可以在该连接器的设置中屏蔽单个工具。
dRE4SG0mip.en: This connector doesn't use authentication. You can block individual tools from the connector's settings.

dRNx90dka9.zh: 您已达到每周 Opus 限额。将于 {day} {time} 重置。
dRNx90dka9.en: You've reached your weekly Opus limit. It resets {day} at {time}.

dUrdi91WLm.zh: 当消息被标记时切换模型
dUrdi91WLm.en: Switch models when a message is flagged

dYJFnkgqHe.zh: 这是 Claude 的默认市场之一。您可以在工作区设置中启用它。
dYJFnkgqHe.en: This is one of Claude's default marketplaces. You can enable it in your workspace settings.

dZ+qQwQue/.zh: 启用 HIPAA 合规后，您可以在 BAA 定义的符合条件服务中使用 PHI。请下载实施指南，了解配置要求、员工培训以及符合条件服务的完整列表。
dZ+qQwQue/.en: Enabling HIPAA compliance allows you to use PHI within the Eligible Services defined in the BAA. Download the Implementation Guide for configuration requirements, workforce training, and the full list of Eligible Services.

de6C2Wzbse.zh: 您的 `WorktreeCreate` 和 `WorktreeRemove` 钩子也会为本地会话运行 — jj 和 Sapling 配置可以使用工作树隔离
de6C2Wzbse.en: Your `WorktreeCreate` and `WorktreeRemove` hooks run for local sessions too — jj and Sapling setups can use worktree isolation

deK3vjiB1v.zh: 先前选择的服务器已不再连接。请返回连接步骤并选择一个服务器。
deK3vjiB1v.en: The previously selected server is no longer connected. Go back to the Connection step and pick a server.

deYXGlbyFa.zh: 代理仅在 Cowork 和 Code 中可用。
deYXGlbyFa.en: Agents are only available in Cowork and Code.

debRh4MYcZ.zh: 我们发现 @{domain} 已有一个 Claude Team 套餐。如果您想保留该工作区和成员，请选择下方的“升级”。
debRh4MYcZ.en: We found an existing Claude Team plan for @{domain}. If you want to keep that workspace and members, choose Upgrade below.

dfCoF2i6bG.zh: 为您的组织选择特定模型。发布新模型时此设置不会更改。
dfCoF2i6bG.en: Select a specific model for your organization. This won't change when new models are released.

drckGukPRv.en: This capability requires chat to be enabled.

drqM35WBPt.zh: 无法启动 SSO。请重试，或使用您的工作邮箱登录。
drqM35WBPt.en: Couldn't start SSO. Try again, or sign in with your work email.

duW5uzGvOT.zh: 每滚动 24 小时包含的例行运行次数。开启后，额外运行将使用用量积分。
duW5uzGvOT.en: Included routine runs per rolling 24 hours. Additional runs use usage credits when turned on.

dvXLXXhO0o.zh: 阅读我关于订阅和发票的邮件，提取供应商 / 日期 / 金额，并为每一项在我的费用电子表格中添加一行。标记任何与预算不符的内容。从我已连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个来源，请在构建前询问。
dvXLXXhO0o.en: Read my emails about subscriptions and invoices, extract vendor / date / amount, and add a line to my expense spreadsheet for each one. Flag anything that doesn't match the budget. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

dwIZ/UipF8.zh: 在与 Claude Code 网页会话相同的沙箱中运行安全扫描。
dwIZ/UipF8.en: Runs security scans in the same sandbox as Claude Code web sessions.

dxgIR941IO.zh: 从沙发到通勤途中，将任务交给 Claude，并从您上次停下的地方继续。
dxgIR941IO.en: From your couch to your commute, hand off tasks to Claude and pick up exactly where you left off.

dy6ehPt97o.zh: {name} 将于 {date} 为您的组织启用。
dy6ehPt97o.en: {name} will be enabled for your organization on {date}.

dz33KviCE3.zh: 无法加载仓库列表。请在下方输入 owner/repo 以继续。
dz33KviCE3.en: Couldn't load the repository list. Type owner/repo below to continue.

e0QDyGA4J4.zh: 响应更快，成本更高。仅限 Opus。
e0QDyGA4J4.en: Faster responses, higher cost. Opus only.

e2MksvaM4d.zh: 帮我做一次差异分析——实际值与预算对比，解释最大的偏差，并标记任何无法对账的项目。从我连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个数据源，请在开始前先询问我。
e2MksvaM4d.en: Run me a variance analysis — actuals vs budget, the biggest deltas explained, and flag anything that doesn't reconcile. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

eAyw5h1GYi.zh: 从差异视图或会话的右键菜单中选择 `Open in editor`
eAyw5h1GYi.en: `Open in editor` from the diff view or a session's right-click menu

eCHBYR3o7a.zh: 即将达到用量额度上限

eF+Y8JJNCJ.zh: 允许 Claude Code 标签页

eGvPBVASAG.zh: 分享此成果时，也会一并分享其关联的附件、文件和评论。新版本将自动分享，以便协作者可以继续对最新内容发表评论。
eGvPBVASAG.en: Sharing this artifact will also share its associated attachments, files, and comments. New versions will be shared automatically so collaborators can keep commenting on the latest content.

eGwmiGJ22O.zh: 域名无效。请使用类似 api.example.com 或 *.example.com 的域名。
eGwmiGJ22O.en: Invalid domain. Use a domain like api.example.com or *.example.com.

eHjxMLTN40.zh: 您的申请正在审核中。审核完成后我们会通过电子邮件通知您，通常需要 2 至 3 个工作日。
eHjxMLTN40.en: Your application is under review. We'll email you once it completes, usually within 2 to 3 business days.

eIcgaocU6c.zh: 该组织不符合此优惠的条件。
eIcgaocU6c.en: That organization isn't eligible for this offer.

eLeuvAEhth.zh: 为季度财务业绩起草一份一页纸的董事会备忘录。我会提供关键数据——请围绕这些数据组织叙述。
eLeuvAEhth.en: Draft a one-page board memo for quarterly financial results. I'll share the headline numbers — structure the narrative around them.

eLsGYCzKGh.zh: 整理一份客户 360 全景

eLyBJOh2pK.zh: 正在使用此成员所在群组和席位等级中的最低限额。请在用量设置中更改优先级。
eLyBJOh2pK.en: Using the lowest limit from this member's groups and seat tier. Change the precedence in usage settings.

eMV1kF66ej.zh: 为代码和终端设置自定义等宽字体。
eMV1kF66ej.en: Set a custom monospace font for code and terminal.

eMWhsJ8TiO.zh: 启用 Cowork 标签页。Claude 将处理研究、分析和文档等较长的任务。
eMWhsJ8TiO.en: Enable the Cowork tab. Claude works on longer tasks like research, analysis, and documents.

eR2n3jLyzd.zh: 当 Claude 在此处给您发消息时，在您的手机上接收通知。
eR2n3jLyzd.en: Get notified on your phone when Claude messages you here.

eSej8NJHSy.zh: 受影响的账户将在 {days} 天后删除，无论用户是否迁移
eSej8NJHSy.en: Affected accounts will be deleted after {days} days, whether users migrate or not

eT3QufLrtq.zh: 功能测试已禁用，因为没有工具标记为 readOnlyHint: true。只有只读工具才符合条件。
eT3QufLrtq.en: Functional testing is disabled because no tools are marked readOnlyHint: true. Only read-only tools are eligible.

eTbxj4xk9C.zh: 为产品管理工作自定义 Claude

eUCFSvDTnZ.zh: 帮我准备一次利益相关者更新——应该重点讲什么，以及会遇到哪些问题。
eUCFSvDTnZ.en: Help me prep a stakeholder update — what to lead with and what questions to expect.

eUqutTpkXV.zh: 点击此处确认购买额外的用户席位，并确认 Anthropic 可按上述方式向您开具发票。
eUqutTpkXV.en: Click here to confirm your purchase of additional User seats and acknowledge that Anthropic may invoice you as above.

eV/BNCIRzM.zh: 已安装的 Claude Code 版本不支持此应用使用的某项功能。请在此主机上更新 Claude Code。
eV/BNCIRzM.en: The installed Claude Code version doesn't support a feature this app uses. Update Claude Code on this host.

ea3NfyQMez.zh: 更新席位等级限额失败。您可以重试。
ea3NfyQMez.en: Failed to update seat tier limit. You can try again.

ebrohjmQEB.zh: 同时删除磁盘上的文件

edRO2Rl84H.zh: 升级到 Pro 或 Team

edmwCy5RuA.zh: 此例程在每次运行开始时加载的 Claude Code 插件。
edmwCy5RuA.en: Claude Code plugins this routine loads at the start of each run.

ee/siz+mkq.zh: <bold>无需询问即可执行已开启。</bold>Claude 会自行工作、使用连接器并浏览网页，无需暂停以等待批准。您可以在添加菜单中关闭单个连接器。<link>查看安全使用提示</link>
ee/siz+mkq.en: <bold>Act without asking is on.</bold> Claude works, uses connectors, and browses the web without pausing for approval. You can turn off individual connectors in the Add menu. <link>See safe use tips</link>

eeh+Jjs5sn.zh: 您可以根据需要多次重试，也可以使用其他方式。如果仍然遇到问题，请联系支持团队。
eeh+Jjs5sn.en: You can try again as many times as you need, including with a different method. If you keep having trouble, contact support.

eeoSImkdiY.zh: 这些范围仅供参考。您团队的消耗量会因规模、工作流程和使用模式而有所不同。
eeoSImkdiY.en: These ranges are for guidance only. Your team's consumption will vary based on size, workflows, and usage patterns.

egShYmLjr8.zh: 开启深色模式时，使用更深的近黑色背景。
egShYmLjr8.en: Use a darker, near-black background when dark mode is on.

egZcnLe3Vv.zh: {count, plural, one {请处理上方的评论} other {请处理上方的评论}}
egZcnLe3Vv.en: {count, plural, one {Please address the comment above} other {Please address the comments above}}

eiKQeeC6XY.zh: Microsoft Entra 要求进行多重身份验证才能连接 {serverName}。请重新登录并完成 MFA 验证提示。
eiKQeeC6XY.en: Microsoft Entra requires multi-factor authentication to connect {serverName}. Sign in again and complete the MFA prompt.

ek/rdG0G9V.zh: 崩溃和错误报告是我们诊断您推理设置特有故障的方式。没有它们，支持响应会更慢。
ek/rdG0G9V.en: Crash and error reports are how we diagnose failures specific to your inference setup. Support turnaround will be slower without them.

ekUhldQH+f.zh: {sessions, plural, one {# 个会话令牌} other {# 个会话令牌}}（由此运行程序签发）也将被吊销——这些会话上正在进行的工作将失败。
ekUhldQH+f.en: {sessions, plural, one {# session token} other {# session tokens}} issued by this runner will also be revoked — work in progress on those sessions will fail.

emdNKVPSQX.zh: 切换到您希望 Claude 使用的 Chrome 窗口。您会在侧边栏看到“Claude Desktop 想要连接”的提示，为浏览器命名并点击连接。
emdNKVPSQX.en: Switch to the Chrome window you want Claude to use. You'll see a “Claude Desktop wants to connect” prompt in the side panel, give the browser a name and click Connect.

emdvKkdMf7.zh: 无法导入该文件。其设置均无法读取。
emdvKkdMf7.en: Couldn't import the file. None of its settings could be read.

emnwYY92/x.zh: 此模式需要协调。请将详情发送电子邮件至 <link>{email}</link>，之后我们才能列出您的服务器。
emnwYY92/x.en: This mode needs coordination. Email <link>{email}</link> with details before we can list your server.

enn6AdQzxk.zh: 提示、补全内容和您的数据绝不会发送给 Anthropic。遥测仅涵盖崩溃和使用信号。
enn6AdQzxk.en: Prompts, completions, and your data are never sent to Anthropic. Telemetry covers crash and usage signals only.

eox9+YBiQM.zh: 成果是在侧边面板中打开的交互式页面。取消可让 Claude 改为将其包含在回复中。
eox9+YBiQM.en: Artifacts are interactive pages that open in a side panel. Cancel to have Claude include it in the reply instead.

epj/3bzMio.zh: 一款驻留在您终端中的智能编程工具。
epj/3bzMio.en: An agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal.

f5pAS1Qsxp.en: Claude Code Desktop already enforces your Managed settings and MDM-deployed configuration. These legacy toggles will be retired in an upcoming release. jn64phvSjS.zh: 由于异常活动，我们已暂停您的账户。我们无法透露具体细节——这会帮助不法分子绕过同样的检查——但此次审查正是您说明情况的机会，以便团队成员进行审核。
jn64phvSjS.en: We put your account on hold because of unusual activity. We can't share the specifics—that would help bad actors get around the same checks—but the review is your chance to share context so a team member can review.

jo5Yhm8cjX.zh: 我们保留手动审核所有服务器的权利。请提供清晰的测试账户设置和访问说明。我们正努力将此流程自动化，以缩短将您的服务器纳入目录所需的时间——请编写这些说明，使其包含自主访问 MCP 服务器所需的每一个链接、凭据和步骤。对于企业账户或需要完整填充账户的服务器，请提供能够访问完整填充账户以供审查的测试凭据。
jo5Yhm8cjX.en: We reserve the right to manually review all servers. Provide clear test-account setup and access instructions. We're working to automate this process to reduce the time it takes to get your server into the directory — write these instructions so they contain every link, credential, and step needed to autonomously access the MCP server. For enterprise accounts or servers that require a fully populated account, provide test credentials that grant access to a fully populated account for review.

nBQeVvSeP7.zh: 当 Claude 将更改推送到分支时，会自动打开拉取请求而无需先询问。仅适用于远程会话。
nBQeVvSeP7.en: When Claude pushes changes to a branch, it automatically opens a pull request without asking first. Applies to remote sessions only.

nGuhQF6s7c.zh: 描述您的典型工作流程，以及您使用哪些 Claude 产品（聊天、API、Claude Code）。
nGuhQF6s7c.en: Describe your typical workflow and which Claude products you use (chat, API, Claude Code).

nIEb3KeGUI.zh: 在浏览器中完成，然后点击以重新连接
nIEb3KeGUI.en: Finish in browser, then click to reconnect

nJFFCU5ncZ.zh: 您已达到{period, select, daily {每日} weekly {每周} monthly {每月} other {}}支出限额。请管理支出限额以立即继续。
nJFFCU5ncZ.en: You've reached your {period, select, daily {daily } weekly {weekly } monthly {monthly } other {}}spend limit. Manage spend limit to keep going now.

nLh88WSaL+.zh: 更新工作流设置失败。请重试。
nLh88WSaL+.en: Failed to update workflows setting. Try again.

nM9svJuPoM.zh: 无法加载计划工作。请重新加载页面以重试。
nM9svJuPoM.en: Couldn't load scheduled work. Reload the page to try again.

nN4nDZfEes.zh: 查看组织用量分析和活动仪表板。
nN4nDZfEes.en: View organization usage analytics and activity dashboards.

nOBN85iT+Z.zh: 使用您的设备管理工具将插件包挂载到此文件夹，Cowork 将在启动时加载它们。该文件夹为只读；您在下方设置的工具策略保存在此配置中。
nOBN85iT+Z.en: Mount plugin bundles to this folder using your device-management tool and Cowork will load them at launch. The folder is read-only; tool policies you set below are saved in this configuration.

nOLuwYiSJ0.zh: 允许成员在达到用量上限时请求提高限额。
nOLuwYiSJ0.en: Allow members to request a limit increase when they reach their usage limit.

nPX61KkXA8.zh: 辅助程序在退出前被终止

nTBGuhcdBj.zh: 正在检查已连接的浏览器…

nY6cJ7ZMXk.zh: 此 Claude.ai 账户与您的组织不匹配。请使用您的工作账户登录。
nY6cJ7ZMXk.en: This Claude.ai account doesn't match your organization. Sign in with your work account.

nYTRjcoCf/.zh: 您账户的用量额度已关闭。请管理支出限额以立即继续。
nYTRjcoCf/.en: Usage credits are turned off for your account. Manage spend limit to keep going now.

nZAVyUccg2.zh: 请提交或暂存更改，或检查您的仓库是否存在缺少分支、文件被锁定或 Git LFS 配置等问题。
nZAVyUccg2.en: Commit or stash changes, or check your repository for issues like a missing branch, locked files, or Git LFS setup.

nZg0AjOHKf.zh: 开启 Claude Code on the web 以使用 Claude Security
nZg0AjOHKf.en: Turn on Claude Code on the web to use Claude Security

ndWa897vah.zh: 隐藏 Anthropic 托管的环境

neSuIPewuG.zh: 请使用注册 ID、此密钥以及您的本地 CA 密钥对（您注册的证书及其私钥，私钥始终未离开您的设备）部署 agent-proxy 二进制文件：
neSuIPewuG.en: Deploy the agent-proxy binary with the registration ID, this secret, and your local CA keypair (the cert you registered plus its private key, which never left your machine):

nhz8zOwwA2.zh: 允许成员扫描已安装 Claude GitHub App 的仓库。
nhz8zOwwA2.en: Let members scan repositories where the Claude GitHub App is installed.

njZwNcDCHM.zh: 拉取目标公司的最新财报电话会议记录和 10-Q，提取业绩指引和关键 KPI，与上季度进行对比，并构建一张与同行的可比公司表。请从我连接的工具中获取数据。如果缺少某个来源，请在构建前先询问。
njZwNcDCHM.en: Pull the latest earnings transcript and 10-Q for a target, extract guidance and key KPIs, compare to last quarter, and build a comps table against peers. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

nlt3l7sZeV.zh: 为我的初创公司拟一份路演演示文稿大纲——问题、解决方案、市场、增长情况、诉求。
nlt3l7sZeV.en: Outline a pitch deck for my startup — problem, solution, market, traction, ask.

nqAdNRIB3s.zh: 在 stdout 上打印客户端密钥的可执行文件。会覆盖内联值。
nqAdNRIB3s.en: Executable that prints the client secret on stdout. Overrides the inline value.

nqJWJ2gwBa.zh: 控制 Claude Desktop 应用程序的事件，与 Cowork 和 Code 会话相互独立。默认为 error。
nqJWJ2gwBa.en: Controls the Claude Desktop application's events, separate from Cowork and Code sessions. Defaults to error.

nqZ+ZcG/4J.zh: 部分文件上传失败——其余文件已附加。
nqZ+ZcG/4J.en: Some files failed to upload — the rest were attached.

ntHXOjbf0G.zh: 所有环境和池关联会立即移除，因此新会话将不再通过此代理路由。代理集群将停止心跳并关闭。已在运行的会话会保留其隧道，直到结束。
ntHXOjbf0G.en: All environment and pool associations are removed immediately, so new sessions stop routing through this proxy. The proxy fleet stops heartbeating and shuts down. Sessions already running keep their tunnel until they end.

nwFCeft5Tp.zh: 现有 API 密钥现在可以使用分析权限范围
nwFCeft5Tp.en: Existing API keys can now use analytics scopes

nzAlf/Dr9C.zh: 在 PR 栏中一并查看相关和堆叠的 PR
nzAlf/Dr9C.en: See related and stacked PRs together in the PR bar

o+mz04cqV4.zh: 根据 PRD 构建创意原型
o+mz04cqV4.en: Prototype an idea from a PRD

o0AKZGU+ZU.zh: 您好 {name}，让我们为您的团队找到合适的方案。
o0AKZGU+ZU.en: Hi {name}, let's find the right plan for your team.

o0NDb5qFVI.zh: 随附的模板是英文的——请改用我的语言生成成果。
o0NDb5qFVI.en: The attached template is in English — produce the artifact in my language instead.

o17K0wzbTf.zh: 清除 {count, plural, one {# 项选择} other {# 项选择}}
o17K0wzbTf.en: Clear {count, plural, one {# selection} other {# selections}}

o2bzk/hqlN.zh: 连接器搜索已关闭。可随时在设置中更改。
o2bzk/hqlN.en: Connector search turned off. Change anytime in Settings.

o3UFEvqykP.zh: 无法更新身份验证模式。请重试。
o3UFEvqykP.en: Couldn't update the authentication mode. Try again.

o45ANoEdsm.zh: 创建 API 密钥失败。您可以重试。
o45ANoEdsm.en: Failed to create the API key. You can try again.

o6VLRz4ffK.zh: 您的组织强制使用固定的默认值，因此每个新对话都会重置为默认值。成员自己的选择不会延续。
o6VLRz4ffK.en: Your organization enforces a fixed default, so each new conversation resets to the default. Members' own choices don't carry over.

o76PKBGVE1.zh: 脚本在生成凭据之前已终止。
o76PKBGVE1.en: Script terminated before producing a credential.

o7TUWXKFIz.zh: 为 {count} 名选定成员添加自定义支出上限。
o7TUWXKFIz.en: Add custom spend limits for {count} selected members.

o93iHAIei0.zh: 右键单击文件树中的任意文件夹 → `Open in terminal`
o93iHAIei0.en: Right-click any folder in the file tree → `Open in terminal`

oCUtTGiVOc.zh: `/btw` 或 [[cmd+;]] 可在不打断主会话的情况下打开与 Claude 的侧边聊天
oCUtTGiVOc.en: `/btw` or [[cmd+;]] opens a side chat with Claude without interrupting your main session

oCWGw0AsBF.zh: 我在哪里可以找到这个？

oDcm0x0gqJ.zh: 无法加载此成员的限额。请检查您的连接并重试。
oDcm0x0gqJ.en: Couldn't load this member's limits. Check your connection and try again.

oDjail5Qj2.zh: 应用于此群组每位成员的默认每日支出上限。席位层级仅按月计算。
oDjail5Qj2.en: The default daily spend limit applied to each member of this group. Seat tiers are monthly-only.

oDlZbF08hl.zh: 交付任务后，Claude 会在您的文件夹、应用和浏览器中工作。
oDlZbF08hl.en: Hand off tasks and Claude works in your folders, apps, and browser.

oILLvyXvqn.zh: 使用 Claude Code 真正构建此项目
oILLvyXvqn.en: Build this for real with Claude Code

oIdTieNI8W.zh: 可与组织内所有人分享项目。关闭时，项目仍可与个别用户分享。
oIdTieNI8W.en: Ability to share projects with everyone in your organization. When off, projects can still be shared with individual users.

oIuIOzlHdS.zh: <bold>无需询问即可执行已开启。</bold>Claude 会直接工作并使用连接器，不会暂停以等待批准。您可以在添加菜单中关闭单个连接器。<link>查看安全使用提示</link>
oIuIOzlHdS.en: <bold>Act without asking is on.</bold> Claude works and uses connectors without pausing for approval. You can turn off individual connectors in the Add menu. <link>See safe use tips</link>

oLjWuwuWon.zh: Anthropic 托管的环境已隐藏

oMMPQhnWpD.zh: 某些工具会返回 401 并按需提示进行身份验证（服务器以无身份验证方式启动）
oMMPQhnWpD.en: Some tools return 401 and prompt for auth on demand (server starts authless)

oOkvYkq+lC.zh: 未连接模拟器。请在下方选择一台设备——已关闭的设备将被启动。
oOkvYkq+lC.en: No simulator attached. Pick a device below — Shutdown devices will be booted.

oPXeOoRDu+.zh: 此会话的工作树已在远程主机上被移除。请分叉会话以在新的工作树中继续此对话。
oPXeOoRDu+.en: This session's worktree was removed on the remote host. Fork the session to continue this conversation in a fresh worktree.

oRZy+mE3Yg.zh: URL 涵盖的设置在下方为只读。
oRZy+mE3Yg.en: Settings covered by the URL are read-only below.

oV+n2tkso5.zh: 文件上传期间无法回溯
oV+n2tkso5.en: Rewind is unavailable while files are uploading

oWCbrRNN5e.zh: · {count, plural, one {# 项资源} other {# 项资源}}

oWtfUA9kKn.zh: 从最近标题菜单中一次性归档或删除多个会话
oWtfUA9kKn.en: Archive or delete several sessions at once from the Recents header menu

oaEmIzxURK.zh: 咨询定价、安全性或哪种方案适合
oaEmIzxURK.en: Ask about pricing, security, or what plan fits

ob/MsgCqeR.zh: 继续即表示您同意我们的{privacyPolicy}。
ob/MsgCqeR.en: By continuing, you agree to our {privacyPolicy}.

obcOV35zKP.zh: 构建 6 个月的现金流预测——乐观、基准和悲观三种情景——并标记最大的风险。从我连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个来源，请在构建前询问。
obcOV35zKP.en: Build a 6-month cashflow forecast — optimistic, base, and pessimistic scenarios — and flag the biggest risks. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

obhoLqPiUC.zh: 我会**建议适合您的起点**，让您不必面对空白页面。
obhoLqPiUC.en: I’ll **suggest starting points** that fit you, so you’re not staring at a blank page.

ojjuTNti3X.zh: 使用 API 密钥（而非登录）对 Claude Code 进行身份验证的用户会将用量报告到您的 Console 组织，而非此仪表板。
ojjuTNti3X.en: Users who authenticate Claude Code with an API key (instead of signing in) report usage to your Console organization, not this dashboard.

ojvWL/P2FT.zh: 构建每周优先事项指挥中心
ojvWL/P2FT.en: Build a weekly priorities command center

ol5e3EGVkn.zh: 您的麦克风未拾取到音频。您可以检查输入设备并重试。
ol5e3EGVkn.en: Your microphone isn't picking up audio. You can check your input device and try again.

omq6PdW3ff.zh: 您的连接正常，但提供商拒绝了测试请求。这通常是您的管理员可以解决的模型访问或配额问题。
omq6PdW3ff.en: Your connection works, but the provider rejected a test request. This is often a model-access or quota issue your admin can resolve.

oo3cP6GRIE.zh: 您的组织本月的用量额度已用完。我们已通知您的管理员。
oo3cP6GRIE.en: Your org is out of usage credits for the month. We let your admin know.

ooNoKkHuyF.zh: 编辑我的草稿，使其更清晰流畅——保留我的风格，删去任何多余的内容。我接下来会粘贴。
ooNoKkHuyF.en: Edit my draft for clarity and flow — keep my voice, cut anything that doesn't earn its place. I'll paste it next.

os5Efgh+1R.zh: [[cmd+k]] 可查找您打开应用后启动的会话，并搜索文件夹内的分支
os5Efgh+1R.en: [[cmd+k]] finds sessions you started since opening the app, and searches branches inside folders

ouQJbxzDP5.zh: 请求已发送给您的管理员。您的方案用量将于 {time} 重置。
ouQJbxzDP5.en: Request sent to your admin. Your plan usage resets at {time}.

ourJRJheT4.zh: 您的赠礼可抵扣您的下一张账单。在本计费周期之后，您仍有 {remainder} 可用于未来的账单。
ourJRJheT4.en: Your gift covers your next invoice. After this billing cycle, you’ll still have {remainder} left for future invoices.

ovh8zyJkaM.zh: 已被您的管理员屏蔽（将不会运行）
ovh8zyJkaM.en: blocked by your admin (will not run)

ox7fwjKfD/.zh: 我会在下方粘贴我的评估结果。请帮我解读这些指标的含义，并建议接下来可以尝试什么。
ox7fwjKfD/.en: I'll paste my evaluation results below. Help me interpret what the metrics mean and suggest what to try next.

ozzKmITBMv.zh: 每位用户的软上限，在下方时长内按客户端计算。并非服务器强制执行的配额。
ozzKmITBMv.en: Per-user soft cap, counted client-side over the duration below. Not a server-enforced quota.

p0EezHw7Ok.zh: 每次同步时，成员会根据 IdP 群组成员身份被分配到一个角色。如果他们的 IdP 群组映射到多个角色，则应用下表中的第一个角色。不属于任何已映射群组的成员将被移出组织。
p0EezHw7Ok.en: Members are assigned to one role based on IdP group membership on each sync. If their IdP groups map to multiple roles, the first role in the table below applies. Members not in a mapped group are removed from the organization.

p2tXYvgZQP.zh: 现有 API 密钥现在被禁止使用分析权限范围
p2tXYvgZQP.en: Existing API keys are now blocked from using analytics scopes

p33uKUDXaM.zh: 指导我如何为数据科学结果选择合适的图表。
p33uKUDXaM.en: Walk me through how to choose the right chart for a data science result.

p4M9yr6CUo.zh: 按年计费时每席位/月。按月计费时为 {standardMonthlyPrice}/席位{taxSuffix}。最少 {minimumSeatCount, plural, one {# 个席位} other {# 个席位}}。
p4M9yr6CUo.en: Per seat / month if billed annually. {standardMonthlyPrice}/seat{taxSuffix} if billed monthly. Minimum {minimumSeatCount, plural, one {# seat} other {# seats}}.

pBe3uZPnMp.zh: 请在上方验证一个域名以开启此功能。
pBe3uZPnMp.en: Verify a domain above to turn this on.

pBgZotXlmX.zh: 指向打印凭据的可执行文件的绝对路径，可选择附带每个请求的标头。
pBgZotXlmX.en: Absolute path to an executable that prints the credential, optionally with per-request headers.

pCEGmnWQtV.zh: 给我一个客户的全方位 360 度概览——交易历史、近期通话和邮件、未解决的问题、新闻，以及一个用颜色标记的健康度评分。从我连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个来源，请在构建前询问。
pCEGmnWQtV.en: Give me a full 360 on an account — deal history, recent calls and emails, open issues, news, and a color-coded health score. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

pDu8LAeMGn.zh: 无法在远程主机上启动 Claude Code
pDu8LAeMGn.en: Couldn't start Claude Code on the remote host

pEcGYF8Hfi.zh: {count, plural, one {# 名成员希望} other {# 名成员希望}}访问 {feature}。
pEcGYF8Hfi.en: {count, plural, one {# member wants} other {# members want}} to access {feature}.

pFm2K7k3z/.zh: 添加用量额度时出现问题。请联系支持以获取帮助。
pFm2K7k3z/.en: Something went wrong when adding your usage credits. Contact support for help.

pG4M7DKJyA.zh: 来自 {serverName} 的 {toolName} 想要打开一个 URL
pG4M7DKJyA.en: {toolName} from {serverName} wants to open a URL

pHgzQbi08m.zh: 无法保存模型默认值。请重试。
pHgzQbi08m.en: Couldn't save model defaults. Try again.

pLJvmpJKk5.zh: 帮我制定一份考试备考计划——每天复习什么，以及如何自我检测。
pLJvmpJKk5.en: Help me make a study plan for an exam — what to cover each day and how to test myself.

pMSvrNHUFy.zh: 开启用量额度，在达到限制时可继续使用 Claude。<link>了解更多</link>
pMSvrNHUFy.en: Turn on usage credits to keep using Claude if you hit a limit. <link>Learn more</link>

pNZUCYa4jA.zh: 包含未提交更改的会话不再自动归档
pNZUCYa4jA.en: Sessions with uncommitted changes are no longer auto-archived

pNuagxf0/v.zh: PEM 编码的 CA 证书（代理的 MITM CA）。粘贴 .crt 文件——私钥仍保留在代理处。代理会在每次心跳时根据此证书校验其 CA 指纹。
pNuagxf0/v.en: PEM-encoded CA cert (the proxy's MITM CA). Paste the .crt — the private key stays with the proxy. The proxy validates its CA fingerprint against this on every heartbeat.

pPg+NzFStg.zh: 找不到对话中的该处位置。请重新发送您的消息以继续会话。
pPg+NzFStg.en: That point in the conversation couldn't be found. Send your message again to continue the session.

pQ5vWqowS8.zh: 帮我界定一次咨询项目的范围——推荐各个阶段、关键交付物，以及主要风险通常所在之处。
pQ5vWqowS8.en: Help me scope a consulting engagement — recommend phases, key deliverables, and where the main risks typically sit.

pTf9owcUnZ.zh: Max 套餐可享无限项目

pUFr0I705E.zh: 撤销运行器令牌失败。您可以重试。
pUFr0I705E.en: Failed to revoke runner token. You can try again.

pV8HdOgErh.zh: 当会话的凭据过期时，使用 CLAUDE_HELPER_CONTEXT=mid-session-refresh 重新运行助手程序以静默恢复。如果您的助手程序无法以非交互方式运行，请关闭此项。
pV8HdOgErh.en: When a session's credential expires, re-run the helper with CLAUDE_HELPER_CONTEXT=mid-session-refresh to recover silently. Turn this off if your helper can't run non-interactively.

pWv55L2571.zh: 您已达到每周 Cowork 限制。将于 {day} {time} 重置。
pWv55L2571.en: You've reached your weekly Cowork limit. It resets {day} at {time}.

pYRPMBAE8N.zh: 编辑此消息将从此处重新开始对话。
pYRPMBAE8N.en: Editing this message will restart the conversation from here.

pao2bCavYH.zh: 您确定要拒绝来自 {name} 的此用量额度请求吗？此操作无法撤销。
pao2bCavYH.en: Are you sure you want to dismiss this usage credit request from {name}? This action cannot be undone.

pbSQz7YmWX.zh: 给我一个样本客户账户的完整 360° 全景——成交历史、近期活动、未结问题、新闻，以及一个我能在 90 秒内浏览完的健康度评分。先用一个虚构账户开始。我们稍后可以连接我的 CRM、支持工具，或粘贴客户列表。
pbSQz7YmWX.en: Give me a full 360° on a sample customer account — deal history, recent activity, open issues, news, and a health score I can scan in 90 seconds. Use a made-up account to start. We can connect my CRM, my support tool, or paste a customer list later.

pcL9DX2Bsb.zh: 采用每项功能的用户与未采用的用户相比表现如何，以 {metric} 衡量。当任一组别的用户少于 10 人时予以隐藏。
pcL9DX2Bsb.en: How users who adopt each feature compare to those who don't, measured by {metric}. Suppressed when either cohort has fewer than 10 users.

pcZ2IBDdS3.zh: 将设置命令复制到剪贴板

pi7b/tWojv.zh: 在 Claude Design 中生成的两个日记应用设计方向的插图
pi7b/tWojv.en: Illustration of two journal app design directions generated in Claude Design

pizdDc/r5c.zh: 请求使用代理自身的 AWS 服务身份（Web 身份联合）进行签名。不存储任何机密材料。
pizdDc/r5c.en: Requests are signed with the proxy's own AWS service identity (web-identity federation). No secret material is stored.

Use this template, and pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

security/model_not_available.en: The selected model isn't available for your organization. Choose a different model.

security/org_out_of_credits.zh: 您的组织已用尽用量额度。
security/org_out_of_credits.en: Your organization is out of usage credits.

security/org_spend_limit_reached.zh: 已达到您组织的支出上限。
security/org_spend_limit_reached.en: Your organization's spend limit has been reached.

security/project_scan_in_progress.zh: 此项目已有扫描正在运行。请等待其完成后再开始新的扫描。
security/project_scan_in_progress.en: A scan is already running for this project. Wait for it to finish before starting another.

security/resync/ip_allowlist.zh: 您的 GitHub 组织设置了 IP 允许列表，导致 Claude 的服务器无法访问此仓库。请将 <link>Claude 的 IP 范围</link> 添加到您的 GitHub 允许列表。
security/resync/ip_allowlist.en: Your GitHub organization has an IP allowlist that is blocking Claude's servers from reaching this repository. Add <link>Claude's IP ranges</link> to your GitHub allowlist.

security/resync/user_no_access.zh: GitHub 对此仓库返回了“未找到”。要么您无权访问该仓库，要么它未包含在此组织的 Claude GitHub App 仓库选择范围内。请向仓库管理员申请访问权限，或请您的 GitHub 组织管理员添加它（GitHub → 组织设置 → GitHub Apps → Claude → 仓库访问）。
security/resync/user_no_access.en: GitHub returned 'not found' for this repository. Either you don't have access to it, or it isn't included in the Claude GitHub App's repository selection for this organization. Ask a repository admin for access, or ask your GitHub org admin to add it (GitHub → Org settings → GitHub Apps → Claude → Repository access).

security/scan_cost_exceeds_headroom.zh: 此扫描预留的额度将超出您剩余的结算余量。
security/scan_cost_exceeds_headroom.en: This scan's reserved credits would exceed your remaining billing headroom.

security/scan_couldnt_start.en: The scan couldn't start. Try running it again.

security/scan_no_results.zh: 扫描遇到问题，未能完成。请重试。
security/scan_no_results.en: The scan ran into a problem and didn't finish. Try running it again.

security/service_spend_limit_reached.zh: 已达到您组织的 Claude Security 支出上限。
security/service_spend_limit_reached.en: The Claude Security spend limit for your organization has been reached.

security/session_timed_out.en: The scan timed out. Try running it again.

sfg9n9BlRD.zh: 禁用零数据保留会改变您组织的 Claude Code 数据的处理方式。请查看并确认以下条款以继续。
sfg9n9BlRD.en: Disabling Zero Data Retention changes how your organization’s Claude Code data is handled. Review and acknowledge the terms below to continue.

sipjfZmVF9.zh: 您的套餐已取消。续订套餐以恢复访问权限。
sipjfZmVF9.en: Your plan was canceled. Renew your plan to restore access.

sj38GHbBxz.zh: 部分连接器请求无法忽略。您可以重试。
sj38GHbBxz.en: Some connector requests couldn't be dismissed. You can try again.

smKGHFmiht.en: The certificate couldn't be removed. Try again.

spLkCJotvs.zh: 您在 <bold>{domain}</bold> 的团队已在使用 Claude。
spLkCJotvs.en: Your team at <bold>{domain}</bold> is already on Claude.

sqfi+II5M9.zh: 端点为纯 HTTP；认证凭据将以明文传输。
sqfi+II5M9.en: Endpoint is plain HTTP; auth credentials travel in cleartext.

ssmKrOHndG.zh: 运行并行智能体——每个都拥有完整的终端、编辑器和预览——让您无需离开会话即可构建、审查和修正。
ssmKrOHndG.en: Run parallel agents—each with a full terminal, editor, and preview—so you can build, review, and correct without ever leaving the session.

sv2A53seir.zh: 已预留。将在下次部署时生效。
sv2A53seir.en: Reserved. Takes effect on the next deploy.

swKnU9TQJ9.zh: 未找到模拟器——请在 Android Studio 中创建一个
swKnU9TQJ9.en: No emulators found — create one in Android Studio

syhtMdzH3S.zh: 我想把此文件夹中最大的文件重构为更小的模块。在改动任何内容之前，请先写一份计划：是哪个文件、您会如何拆分、可能会破坏什么。等我同意后再继续。
syhtMdzH3S.en: I want to refactor the largest file in this folder into smaller modules. Before touching anything, write a plan: which file, how you would split it, what could break. Wait for my go-ahead.

t+whQh8PDG.zh: 升级到 Claude Max 以使用我们的旧版模型
t+whQh8PDG.en: Upgrade to Claude Max to use our legacy models

t0Vcp1t2C6.zh: 您不符合此优惠的资格。
t0Vcp1t2C6.en: You aren't eligible for this offer.

t4jUKhgBRC.zh: 送给朋友一周免费的 Cowork。如果他们喜欢并订阅，您将获得 {rewardAmount} 用量额度。<termsLink>适用条款</termsLink>
t4jUKhgBRC.en: Send a friend a free week of Cowork. If they love it and subscribe, you'll get {rewardAmount} in usage credits. <termsLink>Terms apply</termsLink>

t8UlU+rfkJ.zh: 在对话旁边的专用窗口中生成代码、文档和设计。
t8UlU+rfkJ.en: Generate code, documents, and designs in a dedicated window alongside your conversation.

t9Edz+c6F/.zh: 已保存的端点、标头和资源属性将被移除，遥测导出将停止。
t9Edz+c6F/.en: The saved endpoint, headers, and resource attributes will be removed and telemetry export will stop.

tFIy+ZTdIg.zh: 点击“订阅”即表示您同意 Anthropic 的 <terms>商业条款</terms>，包括任何 <serviceTerms>特定服务条款</serviceTerms>，并声明您已获得客户授权可签订本协议。提供您的付款信息即表示您允许 Anthropic 今日按上述金额扣款，此后自 {trialEndDate} 起按 {billingInterval} 收取您的全额订阅费用，直至您按照我们的 <cancellation>条款</cancellation> 取消。还适用其他 <promoTerms>促销条款</promoTerms>。您可以随时取消。
tFIy+ZTdIg.en: By clicking ‘Subscribe’, you agree to Anthropic’s <terms>Commercial Terms</terms> including any <serviceTerms>Service Specific Terms</serviceTerms>, and you represent that you are authorized to enter this agreement by Customer. By providing your payment information, you allow Anthropic to charge your card in the amount above today, then your full subscription price {billingInterval} starting {trialEndDate}, until you cancel in accordance with our <cancellation>terms</cancellation>. Additional <promoTerms>promotional terms</promoTerms> apply. You can cancel at any time.

tGPL3D8V7/.zh: 请帮我撰写每周的利益相关者更新——交付了什么、我们学到了什么、接下来要做什么、需要关注什么——供我在发布前审阅。请从我已连接的工具中获取数据。如果缺少某个来源，请在撰写前询问我。
tGPL3D8V7/.en: Write my weekly stakeholder update — what shipped, what we learned, what's next, and what to watch — for me to review before I post it. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

tICNG3XM2D.zh: 要求使用您已验证域名的账户迁移到您的组织（团队账户除外）。对于在 {days} 天内未迁移的任何人，我们将把其数据通过电子邮件发送给他们，然后删除其账户。
tICNG3XM2D.en: Require accounts using your verified domains to migrate to your organization (excluding Team accounts). For anyone who doesn't migrate within {days} days, we'll email their data and then delete their account.

tMa1K2yQ90.zh: 您的账户已恢复，我们赠送您 {credit}
tMa1K2yQ90.en: Your account is back, with {credit} on us

tNxpKP4AlE.zh: 停止 Cowork 获取更新。您需要自行推送新版本。
tNxpKP4AlE.en: Stop Cowork from fetching updates. You'll need to push new versions yourself.

tQVvCrCxZY.zh: 将此配置指向引导 URL，让您的组织远程管理这些设置。
tQVvCrCxZY.en: Point this configuration at a bootstrap URL to have your organization manage these settings remotely.

tQkGeo/pLH.zh: “始终允许”的选择现在会在您退出应用后保留
tQkGeo/pLH.en: "Always allow" choices now persist after you quit the app

tSDtXt8ujX.zh: 如果您认为这是一个错误，请发送电子邮件至 {email}。
tSDtXt8ujX.en: If you believe this is a mistake, email {email}.

tSYisYSlsV.zh: 已保存一个值。输入新值以替换它。
tSYisYSlsV.en: A value is already saved. Enter a new one to replace it.

tSwEpl8XcL.zh: {count, plural, one {# 个会话卡住} other {# 个会话卡住}} — 在各 3 个不同的运行器上失败。自动恢复已用尽。请检查运行器日志，然后重试或忽略。
tSwEpl8XcL.en: {count, plural, one {# session stuck} other {# sessions stuck}} — failed on 3 different runners each. Auto-recovery exhausted. Check runner logs, then retry or dismiss.

tTCSuAGxCA.zh: 尚无可用的项目快照。请在捕获某个版本后重试。
tTCSuAGxCA.en: No project snapshot is available yet. Try again once a version has been captured.

tVdYWhBwbU.zh: Claude 无法写入该文件夹。请选择另一个。
tVdYWhBwbU.en: Claude can’t write to that folder. Choose another.

tY5160Q3XW.zh: 此连接器的服务器当前不可用。请稍后重试。
tY5160Q3XW.en: This connector's server is currently unavailable. Try again in a moment.

tZZd4f7e0+.zh: 在您的浏览器中批准该请求，然后返回此处。
tZZd4f7e0+.en: Approve the request in your browser, then return here.

tb1OJygJ7I.zh: 在插件发布使用此名称的 MCP 服务器后生效。
tb1OJygJ7I.en: Applies once a plugin ships an MCP server with this name.

tbgDpfcbO5.zh: 仅当您的 IdP 注册的重定向 URI 指定了 localhost 时才使用它。
tbgDpfcbO5.en: Use localhost only if your IdP's registered redirect URI specifies it.

tcQPkx2rdY.zh: 让 Claude 能够在对话中运行代码、创建文档（Word、Excel、PowerPoint、PDF）并访问网络资源。
tcQPkx2rdY.en: Ability for Claude to run code, create documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, PDF), and access network resources within conversations.

tdj4b/xhUV.zh: Azure AI Foundry 资源名称

teAvB8PI+7.zh: Claude 尚无权访问您的任何 GitHub 仓库。请在 GitHub 上选择要扫描的仓库。
teAvB8PI+7.en: Claude doesn't have access to any of your GitHub repositories yet. Choose which ones to scan on GitHub.

tfv2SIF8uB.zh: 无法加载共享内容。请刷新后重试。
tfv2SIF8uB.en: Couldn't load shared content. Refresh and try again.

tgblN/n/hK.zh: 用户可作为工作区附加的文件夹。留空则不受限制访问。
tgblN/n/hK.en: Folders users may attach as a workspace. Leave unset for unrestricted access.

tgkg69DKCl.zh: 您正在通过组织自有的推理服务提供方（{providerDisplayName}）运行 Claude。您的对话将发送至该处，而非 Anthropic，并受您所在组织与该提供方之间的协议约束。
tgkg69DKCl.en: You’re running Claude through your organization’s own inference provider ({providerDisplayName}). Your conversations are sent there, not to Anthropic, and are governed by your organization’s agreement with that provider.

th9drTpWHk.zh: 未结发现项数量随时间的变化。今日数值为精确值；此前各日的数值由每日检测与解决活动推算得出。
th9drTpWHk.en: Open-finding count over time. Today's value is exact; earlier days are derived from daily detection and resolution activity.

thmTw+Z7rC.zh: 此会话暂无可用的实时摘要
thmTw+Z7rC.en: Live summary isn't available for this session yet

tkhIquzFus.zh: 此连接器没有可配置的工具。
tkhIquzFus.en: This connector has no tools to configure.

tm3qriXsGs.zh: 目录连接器中禁止赞助、推广和广告内容。此连接器是否包含任何此类内容？
tm3qriXsGs.en: Sponsored, promoted, and advertising content is prohibited in directory connectors. Does this connector surface any?

toEmobFiDF.zh: 请求审核，我们的团队将查看您的账户。您对所做工作的描述越具体，我们就越能据此与触发限制的信号进行匹配。
toEmobFiDF.en: Request a review and our team will look over your account. The more specific you are about what you were working on, the better we can match it against the signal that triggered the hold.

tpgRwsCwi1.zh: 撤销 {label} 将立即生效且无法撤销。
tpgRwsCwi1.en: Revoking {label} is immediate and can't be undone.

trmBDXWSf3.zh: 在聊天中头脑风暴，在 Cowork 中构建
trmBDXWSf3.en: Brainstorm in chat, build in Cowork

tsufAXEzIj.en: Please select at least one option.

ttY1TwjFUv.zh: 该目标已路由至其他代理代理服务。请先在该处解除关联。
ttY1TwjFUv.en: That target is already routed to a different agent proxy. Dissociate it there first.

ttfQyydmWq.zh: {filename} · 覆盖 {juris}。您的账单地址位于 {state}。
ttfQyydmWq.en: {filename} · covers {juris}. Your billing address is in {state}.

tuAwQteTZC.zh: 您的结账会话已过期。点击重试以开始新的结账。
tuAwQteTZC.en: Your checkout session expired. Click Try again to start a new one.

tv0i6r82kR.zh: 获取每日概览，包括会议、近期讨论串和潜在客户动态
tv0i6r82kR.en: Get a daily rundown of meetings, recent threads, and prospect news

u+b+OpBo2Z.zh: Claude Code 拒绝在此机器上以绕过权限模式启动。会话已切换至接受编辑模式——请重新发送您的消息以继续。
u+b+OpBo2Z.en: Claude Code refused to start in Bypass Permissions mode on this machine. The session has been switched to Accept Edits — send your message again to continue.

u1nE4xvRzb.zh: 为我讲解主要的营销归因模型——首次触点、末次触点、线性和时间衰减——以及各自适用的场景。
u1nE4xvRzb.en: Walk me through the main marketing attribution models — first-touch, last-touch, linear, time-decay — and when each one makes sense.

u2FtqndK9t.zh: 在您的机器上运行 claude rc 即可从这里编写代码。
u2FtqndK9t.en: Run claude rc on your machine to code from here.

u34ZldItJv.zh: 您为未使用的用量额度支付的金额（{amount}，税前）将退回至您的卡。
u34ZldItJv.en: The amount you paid for unused usage credits ({amount}, before tax) will be refunded to your card.

u58ODvHlfF.zh: 送朋友一周免费的 Claude Code。如果他们喜欢并订阅，您将获得 {rewardAmount} 的用量额度以继续构建。<termsLink>条款适用</termsLink>
u58ODvHlfF.en: Send a friend a free week of Claude Code. If they love it and subscribe, you'll get {rewardAmount} in usage credits to keep building. <termsLink>Terms apply</termsLink>

u5HPoAdU8m.zh: {count, plural, one {# 个其他角色} other {# 个其他角色}}
u5HPoAdU8m.en: {count, plural, one {# other role} other {# other roles}}

u5yuAufK9w.zh: 在用量不足时自动购买更多用量额度。
u5yuAufK9w.en: Automatically buy more usage credits when you're running low.

u6WxmjB6Ef.zh: 粘贴一份 PEM 编码的证书（-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----）。

uBpPj2y9zj.zh: 错误详情已复制到剪贴板。在 Slack 中粘贴（⌘V），然后将 zip 从访达拖入消息。
uBpPj2y9zj.en: Error details copied to clipboard. Paste in Slack (⌘V), then drag the zip from Finder into the message.

uCy2vV0+ZQ.zh: 错误率反映的是通过 Anthropic 的 HTTP 代理的流量；仅通过旧版 WebSocket 访问的服务器不会在此显示数据。某一 Anthropic 产品上的高错误率可能反映的是我们这端的客户端问题，而非您的服务器问题。
uCy2vV0+ZQ.en: Error rates reflect traffic through Anthropic's HTTP proxy; servers reached only via legacy WebSocket won't show data here. A high rate on one Anthropic product may reflect a client-side issue on our end rather than your server.

uFEmBGoDXf.zh: 对高风险命令进行按用户归因需要近期的 Claude Code 客户端遥测数据；旧版客户端仅显示汇总计数。
uFEmBGoDXf.en: Per-user attribution on risky commands requires recent Claude Code client telemetry; older clients show aggregate counts only.

uH6SWuHogJ.zh: 将每个组织可见项目的扫描结果发送至外部 URL。请求会使用每个 webhook 的密钥进行签名。
uH6SWuHogJ.en: Send scan results from every organization-visible project to an external URL. Requests are signed with a per-webhook secret.

uHQchr2Hxs.zh: 帮我撰写本月的投资人简报。先询问关键指标和一个叙事重点，然后起草。
uHQchr2Hxs.en: Help me write this month's investor update. Ask for the key metrics and one narrative beat, then draft it.

uJ504fQ0kX.zh: 您的账户目前无法进行礼品购买。
uJ504fQ0kX.en: Gift purchases aren't available for your account at this time.

uJac4DtLEH.zh: 点击"已编辑"或"已写入"行上的文件名，即可在差异窗格中打开该文件
uJac4DtLEH.en: Click a filename on an Edited or Wrote row to open that file in the diff pane

uJmganeKau.zh: 此优惠已应用于您的账户。
uJmganeKau.en: This offer has already been applied to your account.

uL66aeCJzL.en: Value does not match the required format.

uNetJV89JF.zh: 移出文档文件夹可以避免文件权限问题。
uNetJV89JF.en: Moving out of the Documents folder can avoid file permission issues.

uNrBqFbR2v.zh: 未列出的工具仍由用户控制。策略以服务器名称为键，即使插件后续更新也依然适用。
uNrBqFbR2v.en: Unlisted tools stay user-controlled. Policy is keyed by server name and applies even if the plugin is later updated.

uOr+P/nXFU.zh: 目前，添加、编辑、启用或禁用 Canvas 实例由 Anthropic 代您处理。
uOr+P/nXFU.en: Adding, editing, enabling, or disabling a Canvas instance is currently handled by Anthropic on your behalf.

uOyE+ZzhxH.zh: {extensionName} 及其配置将从 Claude Desktop 中移除。
uOyE+ZzhxH.en: {extensionName} and its configuration will be removed from Claude Desktop.

uPKONviRDh.zh: 搭建一个周一早晨指挥中心——一个平铺式仪表盘，包含我的待办事项、尚未回复的邮件以及需要准备的会议卡片。从我已连接的工具中提取数据。如果缺少某个数据源，请在构建前询问。
uPKONviRDh.en: Set up a Monday morning command center — a tiled dashboard with cards for my action items, emails I haven't replied to, and meetings that need prep. Pull the data from my connected tools. If you're missing a source, ask before building.

uPXXu0YKec.zh: 需要进行身份验证才能继续。<link>在设置中验证</link>。
uPXXu0YKec.en: Identity verification is required to continue. <link>Verify in Settings</link>.

uPrf4QlRgF.zh: 您现已超出套餐包含的用量。您的会话限额将于 {time} 重置。
uPrf4QlRgF.en: You're now past your plan's included usage. Your session limit resets at {time}.

uRCffDWQcJ.zh: Cowork 发送 OpenTelemetry 日志和指标的目标位置。留空则禁用。
uRCffDWQcJ.en: Where Cowork sends OpenTelemetry logs and metrics. Leave blank to disable.

uUFnwjmwHb.zh: 您已达到上传上限。请稍后重试。
uUFnwjmwHb.en: You've reached the upload limit. Try again later.

uUJRvagdpq.zh: 删除失败。请重试或联系支持团队。
uUJRvagdpq.en: Delete failed. Try again or contact support.

uYLQ5lDLZu.zh: 在模型选择器旁用滑块选择努力程度
uYLQ5lDLZu.en: Choose effort with a slider next to the model picker

uYv0mtuNZV.zh: 按 API 费率可用的用量额度
uYv0mtuNZV.en: Usage credits available at API rates

uZAEAKmgwF.zh: 选择适合您组织的数据留存策略
uZAEAKmgwF.en: Choose a data retention policy that fits your organization

ubTnWU94wG.zh: 确认此代码与浏览器中显示的代码一致。
ubTnWU94wG.en: Confirm this code matches the one shown in your browser.

ubx2Y5m1N0.zh: 您已创建自定义角色，但尚无成员受其管理。只有当成员的角色类型在成员页面上设置为 自定义角色 后，该成员才会遵循自定义角色。自定义角色无法授予在组织级别已禁用的功能。详细了解角色与权限。配置自定义角色时，请查阅设置指南。
ubx2Y5m1N0.en: You've created custom roles, but no members are governed by them yet. A member follows a custom role only after their role type is set to Custom roles on the Members page. Custom roles cannot grant features disabled at the organization level. Learn more about roles and permissions. Please review the setup guide when configuring custom roles.

udhap4HaB5.en: {name} will be turned off by default on {date}.

ueQfzGF5U2.zh: 上方的关键数字根据您的观测用量加上下方的输入计算得出。调整任意值以匹配您自己的基准——覆盖值会重新计算页面，但不会保存。
ueQfzGF5U2.en: The headline numbers above are computed from your observed usage plus the inputs below. Adjust any value to match your own benchmarks — overrides recompute the page but aren't saved.

ufmahxJ7x6.zh: Claude 可以浏览网站并执行操作，无需暂停等待批准。
ufmahxJ7x6.en: Claude can browse and act on sites without pausing for approval.

ufqDr5dsum.zh: 您的卡将以 {currency} 计费。{currency} 金额可能因汇率而有所变动。
